task_completion.description: Navigate to the Personal Workspace and locate the target document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the Personal Workspace with the document 'Draft_Agenda' visible in the list.

task_completion.description: Select the document and initiate a move or cut action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox next to 'Draft_Agenda' is selected, and a 'Move', 'Cut', or 'Add to clipboard' action is clicked or confirmed in the UI.
The UI displays the 'Projects' workspace (path typically /default-domain/workspaces/Projects).

task_completion.description: Complete the move by pasting or dropping the document into the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'Draft_Agenda' is visible in the contents list of the 'Projects' workspace, indicating a successful move.

task_completion.description: Rename the moved document to the target title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document's title is successfully changed to 'Board_Meeting_Agenda_Oct2023' in the 'Projects' workspace, visible either in the document list or the document's detail/edit view.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Nuxeo Platform UI, with clicks and text inputs happening within the web page.

integrity.description: The agent moved the existing document rather than uploading a new file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no 'Upload', 'New Document', or file browser dialogs used to create the file in the Projects workspace. The action should clearly be a paste/move from the clipboard or a move dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's rename or edit functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Edit' tab or rename dialog being opened for the document, and the new title 'Board_Meeting_Agenda_Oct2023' being typed into the title field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document is named 'Draft_Agenda' and starts in the Personal Workspace (/default-domain/UserWorkspaces/Administrator). The target destination is the 'Projects' workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects). The final required name is 'Board_Meeting_Agenda_Oct2023'. It is critical that the document is moved (e.g., via cut/paste or a move button) and NOT uploaded as a new file, as the underlying system requires the original document UUID to be preserved.
